creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: I did builds (and testport) on 11-stable of gdb with DEFAULT_VERSIONS=python=3.5 and 3.6 and both built fine.  I also installed the gdb packages and simple python tests ('python \ print "foo" \ end' on the existing gdb with python2 and 'python \ print("foo") \ end' on the two gdb's built with 3.5 and 3.6) all worked ok.  Does this need any further review or is this ready for commit now?
